text: Traced the full alertmanager notification pipeline across the prometheus/alertmanager repo (found via sourcegraph/alertmanager fork since the canonical repo wasn't indexed). The pipeline flows as follows: (1) **Alert ingestion**: `api/v2/api.go:postAlertsHandler` validates incoming alerts and calls `api.alerts.Put()` to store them via the provider interface (`provider/provider.go`, implemented in `provider/mem/mem.go`). (2) **Dispatcher subscription**: `dispatch/dispatch.go:Dispatcher.run()` subscribes to the alert provider and receives new alerts. For each alert it calls `d.route.Match(alert.Labels)`. (3) **Routing tree traversal**: `dispatch/route.go:Route.Match()` performs a depth-first left-to-right search through the routing tree, returning matching leaf routes. (4) **Aggregation & dispatch**: `dispatch/dispatch.go:processAlert()` places each alert into an aggregation group per matched route. When the group flushes, it calls `d.stage.Exec()`, which is the notification pipeline. (5) **Notification pipeline** (`notify/notify.go`): `PipelineBuilder.New()` constructs a `RoutingStage` (map of receiver→MultiStage). Each receiver's stage chain is: GossipSettleStage → MuteStage(inhibitor) → TimeActiveStage → TimeMuteStage → MuteStage(silencer) → [WaitStage → DedupStage → RetryStage → SetNotifiesStage]. (6) **Inhibition check**: `inhibit/inhibit.go:Inhibitor.Mutes()` checks inhibit rules against active source alerts. (7) **Silence check**: `silence/silence.go:Silencer.Mutes()` checks active silences against alert labels. (8) **Final notifier dispatch**: `notify/notify.go:RetryStage.Exec()` calls `Integration.Notify()` with exponential backoff retry.
